title: Akropolis - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by reentrancy attack on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls deposit() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Multiple withdrawals in a single transaction
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS DEPOSIT() AFTER A FLASH LOAN BORROW IN THE SAME TX
summary: Akropolis suffered a $2 million DAI loss due to a reentrancy attack combined with a flash loan. A malicious contract was used to repeatedly withdraw funds after depositing them, exploiting the deposit function. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
